description.content: Returns a list of available sports and their keys. Free endpoint — no quota consumed. Use the all parameter to include out-of-season sports.

query.description: When true, includes out-of-season sports in the response.

response.name: List of available sports.
Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key.
Too many requests — quota exceeded.

description.content: Returns current odds for a given sport from multiple bookmakers. Quota cost: 1 credit per region per market. Use sport key from /v4/sports or 'upcoming' for cross-sport upcoming events.

query.description: (Required) Comma-separated regions for bookmakers. Values: us, us2, uk, au, eu. Quota: 1 credit per region per market.
Comma-separated betting markets. Values: h2h, spreads, totals, outrights. Defaults to h2h.
Comma-separated bookmaker IDs to filter results. Cannot be used with regions parameter.
Comma-separated event IDs to filter results.
Filter to events commencing after this ISO 8601 datetime.
Filter to events commencing before this ISO 8601 datetime.
Include bookmaker deep-links to the event.
Include maximum bet limit information where available.

variable.description: (Required) Sport key from /v4/sports (e.g., basketball_nba, americanfootball_nfl) or 'upcoming' for cross-sport upcoming events.

response.name: List of events with odds from bookmakers.

variable.description: (Required) Sport key from /v4/sports (e.g., basketball_nba, americanfootball_nfl) or 'upcoming' for cross-sport upcoming events.

header.description: Credits used since last quota reset.

description.content: Returns all available markets for a specific event. Quota: 1 credit per unique market returned per region. Provides comprehensive coverage for a single event including player props and alternate lines.

response.name: Event with comprehensive odds across all markets.
Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key.
Not found — the requested event does not exist.
Too many requests — quota exceeded.

description.content: Returns the list of betting markets available for a specific event, grouped by bookmaker. Useful for discovering which player props and alternate lines are offered before requesting odds. Quota: 1 credit.

response.name: Available markets per bookmaker for the event.
Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key.
Not found — the requested event does not exist.
Too many requests — quota exceeded.

description.content: Returns live and recent scores for a given sport. Quota: 1 credit for live scores only, 2 credits when using the daysFrom parameter. Live scores refresh approximately every 30 seconds.

query.description: Include completed games from this many days ago (1-3). Adding this increases cost to 2 credits.
Comma-separated event IDs to filter results.

response.name: List of events with score information.
Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key.
Too many requests — quota exceeded.

description.content: Returns upcoming event IDs and metadata without odds data. Free endpoint — no quota consumed.

query.description: Filter events commencing after this ISO 8601 datetime.
Filter events commencing before this ISO 8601 datetime.

response.name: List of upcoming events.

description.content: Teams and players in a sport.
Returns a list of teams or players participating in the specified sport. Quota: 1 credit.

response.name: List of participants.

description.content: Returns a snapshot of odds at a specific historical timestamp. Available from June 6, 2020 onwards at 10-minute intervals (5-minute from Sept 2022). Quota: 10 credits per region per market.

query.description: (Required) ISO 8601 timestamp for the historical snapshot (e.g., 2023-09-16T12:00:00Z).

response.name: Historical odds snapshot with navigation timestamps.
Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key.
Too many requests — quota exceeded.

description.content: Returns event data from a specific historical timestamp. Quota: 1 credit (free if no results returned).

query.description: (Required) ISO 8601 timestamp for the historical query.
Filter to events commencing after this datetime.

response.name: Historical event list with navigation timestamps.

description.content: Returns odds for a specific event at a historical snapshot timestamp. Useful for backtesting, line-movement analysis, and reconstructing the full market state of a single event. Quota: 1 credit per unique market per region.

query.description: (Required) ISO 8601 timestamp for the historical snapshot.
Comma-separated betting markets (all market types accepted).

variable.description: (Required) Event ID for the historical snapshot.

response.name: Historical event odds snapshot with timestamp navigation.

variable.description: (Required) Event ID for the historical snapshot.

description.content: The Odds API provides sports betting odds from major bookmakers worldwide. Access current and historical odds for head-to-head, spreads, totals, and outrights markets across 100+ sports. Also provides live scores and event listings. Requires an API key for all requests. Quota is consumed per request based on number of regions and markets requested.
